description_long: This is a distorted representation of an adult pedestrian, with elongated limbs and a body that appears stretched and twisted. The figure is upright, with the legs and arms unnaturally extended and bent, giving a surreal, almost abstract appearance. The clothing is form-fitting, with visible stripes and color blocks, and the head is partially visible with some facial features discernible. The feet are together, and the arms are raised above the head, merging into elongated forms that extend upward. The overall shape is highly stylized, with exaggerated proportions and a lack of fine anatomical detail. The surface appears smooth, with a matte finish and no visible accessories or carried objects.
description: A highly stylized, elongated adult pedestrian figure with stretched limbs and form-fitting clothing, standing upright with arms raised overhead. The surface is smooth and matte, with visible stripes and color blocks.
description_view_0: Front view shows the figure's torso, legs, and feet together, with arms raised and merging above the head.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the extreme elongation and bending of the arms and legs, with the body twisted in profile.
description_view_2: Top-down view reveals the head and shoulders, with arms extending upward and outward, and the legs visible below.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizes the stretched limbs and twisted posture, with the figure's profile visible.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms raised overhead
